title: Removing selinux_tag.sh as no longer needed after 580356f
body:

comments.body:
Hi!  Thanks for spotting this.
CI's currently tripping over a "must add tests" guardrail.  Can you `git commit --amend` and add "[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]" to the body of the commit message?  That'll override that particular check.

> Can you `git commit --amend` and add "[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]" to the body of the commit message? That'll override 
that particular check.

Done
